The '''Jedi Temple Apprentice Tournament''' was a competition held annually at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] during the reign of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Overview==
The Apprentice Tournament was an event sponsored by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] in which its youngest members, the [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiates]], could demonstrate their skills in order to attract the attention of a potential master. Each year, [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Knights]] and [[Jedi Master/Legends|Masters]] alike would flock to the Temple in search of a worthy apprentice to accompany them on missions for the next decade of their life. Students at the Temple prepared for this test, and were often fearful that failure would result in reassignment to the [[Jedi Service Corps/Legends|Jedi Service Corps]], a worthy yet undesired alternative to taking on missions as a Knight.<ref name="TJP" />

Pitting thirty-two apprentices against each other in a series of one-on-one [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|lightsaber duels]], each round ended when a student scored three burns on their opponent with a [[Training lightsaber/Legends|training lightsaber]]. Before each round began, all of the apprentices would gather around the dueling area while pre-selected members from different classes would face off head-to-head. The final round would consist of the upper class as a group, fighting to the last man standing. The Tournament's first two matches had traditionally taken place in the [[Jedi Temple sparring arena|Combat Training Chamber]], until moving onto less artificial environments during the final free-for-all round.<ref name="TJP" />

==History==
===First Tournament of the Clone Wars===
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the Tournament took place in [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], before the [[Battle of Honoghr/Legends|Battle of Honoghr]] and the [[Battle of Rendili|Rendili Fleet Crisis]]. During the Tournament, [[Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy]] had gone down in the first round to a twelve-year-old boy with a broken leg.<ref name="YDR">''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]''</ref>

===Second Tournament of the Clone Wars===
Later that same year, Master [[Ilena Xan|Ilena "Iron-Hand" Xan]] was in charge of the Tournament, observing the preparations before the match and the actual combat.<ref name="YDR" />

====First Round====
During the first round of the Tournament, [[Atresh Pikil]] was pit against [[Gumbrak Hoxz]], [[Flerp]] against [[Zrim]], [[Horororibb]] against [[Boofer]], [[Page]] against [[Gilp]], and [[Pax Chizzik]] against [[Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy]]. Enwandung-Esterhazy beat out Chizzik using deception and her knowledge of pressure points; although [[Hanna Ding]] contested this, Master Xan allowed it.<ref name="YDR" />

====Second Round====
In the next round, Ding was pitted against Enwandung-Esterhazy, in the dark. Ding refused to give into her frustration when her opponent attempted to deceive her, taking a whip kick to the chest. When Ding thought she had beaten Scout, Esterhazy grabbed her [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] blade, which was set at a low setting, and managed to get her in a strangle hold, forcing the [[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanian]] to surrender.<ref name="YDR" />

In other combat sessions, [[Sisseri Deo]] beat out [[Forzi Ghul]] with a roundhouse kick, [[Whie Malreaux/Legends|Whie Malreaux]] preformed exceptionally, as did [[Lena Missa]].<ref name="YDR" />

====Final Round====
The Final round was set in one of the [[Jedi Temple refectory/Legends|refectories]] during a meal. Enwandung-Esterhazy engaged Deo from behind, throwing a glass of [[muja juice]] in his face before ending the fight in a strangle hold. [[Pirt Neer]] and [[Enver Hoxha]]'s duel took most of the attention, while Malreaux and [[Hera Tuix]] fought hand-to-hand, ending in Whie defeating Hera with a wrist-lock. Lena Missa defeated [[Bargu]], who was seen clutching her arm in defeat; Missa than engaged Malreaux, along with, who took Hoxha's lightsaber, forcing him to surrender to Neer. Neer was about to attack Enwandung-Esterhazy, but Missa put her in an arm bar, forcing her to yield also.<ref name="YDR" />

As the last three contestants, Missa, Scout, and Malreaux set to defeat each other. Malreaux defeated Missa in a thumb lock, before setting in at Scout. After succeeding in overcoming a thumb lock, Scout defeated Whie with a shoulder thrust, sending him to the floor.<ref name="YDR" />
